title: 'Special mission warhead': North Korea tests AI-guided cruise missiles, ballistic rockets near South Korea
summary_full: North Korea conducted tests of tactical ballistic missiles, artillery rockets, and AI-guided cruise missiles, aiming to enhance precision-strike capabilities below the nuclear threshold. Leader Kim Jong Un emphasised the combat readiness of these weapons for border deployment.
